title: aetanthus dichotomus
intro: Aetanthus dichotomus, also known as the dichotomous aetanthus, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. Traditionally used in folk medicine, it has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Aetanthus dichotomus include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Aetanthus dichotomus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a herbal remedy.
